description: Payment method update needed — card expired during module add

values.failedActionDescription: charge £39 for the Newsletter module you wanted to add

expected.subject: Quick fix needed: your card
expected.body:
Hi Alex,

Quick heads-up — we tried to charge £39 for the Newsletter module you wanted to add but the
payment didn't go through. Usually that means a card that's
expired or been replaced (happens to everyone).

What we've done:
  • Held off on the change you were trying to make
    (Newsletter), so you're not paying for
    anything you haven't approved.
  • Stopped trying to charge you for now.

What we need from you:
  Just reply to this email. We'll send you a secure link to
  pop in a new card — takes about 30 seconds. Once that's
  done we'll re-run the change and confirm.

Your existing subscription continues as normal — this only
affects the new thing we were trying to add.

— ModuForge
